name: notes4chris
description: Privacy-focused dual-track meeting recorder with AI transcription and speaker-aware summarisation

scripts.build:sck: cd native/sck-audio-capture && swift build -c release && codesign -f -s - --identifier com.christopherrobinson.sck-audio-capture .build/release/sck-audio-capture

author: Christopher Robinson

extendInfo.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Notes4Chris needs microphone access to record your voice during meetings.
extendInfo.NSScreenCaptureUsageDescription: Notes4Chris needs Screen Recording permission to capture system audio during meetings.
